bridge_equation_v34.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v34 = mix(B_plastic_v33, L_sys_expand, 1 - P_sys_expand, D_feature_v28, 1 - G_brain_v28)
bridge_equation_v34.structure_term: B_struct_v34 = mix(B_struct_v33, S_sys_expand, R_sys_expand, 1 - P_sys_expand, D_structure_v28)
bridge_equation_v34.readiness_term: R_train_v34 = mix(R_train_v33, B_plastic_v34, B_struct_v34, R_sys_expand, D_align_v28, 1 - P_sys_expand)
